name: Chestnut and Potato Puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes in 2 quarts of salted water until tender, then drain well.
2. Process the chestnuts until smooth and transfer to a mixing bowl.
3. Mash the drained potatoes with 8 tablespoons of butter until smooth. Transfer to the bowl with the chestnut puree.
4. Whisk together the Creme Fraiche, egg, egg yolk, Calvados, cardamom, salt, and cayenne pepper in a separate bowl.
5. Pour the mixture into a prepared 1 1/2 quart souffle dish and spread evenly.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes before serving. The dish can be made ahead and refrigerated, then baked just before serving.
